framework.name: Decision Rights Clarification as Scaling Prerequisite
framework.description: Scaling requires clarifying decision rights — who decides what when AI recommends something. This is a concrete org-chart move: cross-functional councils, data stewardship assignments, model validation ownership.
framework.raw_quote: data stewardship within finance, model validation within IT, and decision oversight through cross-functional councils

source.title: Bridging the Gaps in AI Transformation: An Evidence-Based ...
